creator: osho@pcc-software.org
text:
I suggest to raise the Importance because many ports depend on python, and python39 is the default python now.  Therefore, it affects certain large size of packages, and users of them.
Moreover, this update contains the security fix (https://www.vuxml.org/freebsd/050eba46-7638-11ed-820d-080027d3a315.html).  I hope the update gets available soon.
